cross_scene_arcs.title: From Control to Collapse: The Erosion of Garcetti's Authority
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Garcetti begins as a commanding figure asserting control over investigations and informants, but his aggressive tactics and off-the-books operations gradually erode his legitimacy, culminating in federal suspicion and his ultimate demise as a compromised operative.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Garcetti is in full command, using institutional authority to direct the investigation and dominate suspects.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Garcetti is exposed, under federal investigation, and ultimately killed—his authority completely dismantled.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Garcetti's actions were driven by rogue corruption or a desperate attempt to uphold justice outside official channels remains ambiguous.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Fractured Alliance: Garcetti and Danny's Destructive Relationship
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Garcetti and Danny's relationship evolves from coercive manipulation to mutual betrayal, marked by psychological pressure, broken trust, and fatal consequences.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Garcetti dominates Danny through physical intimidation and control.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Danny kills Garcetti, revealing himself as an undercover agent, completing a full reversal of power.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The depth of Danny's deception and whether Garcetti ever suspected his true identity remains unclear.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Pursuit of Bubba: Garcetti's Investigative Goal Turned Obsession
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Garcetti's mission to identify and apprehend Bubba evolves from a standard investigation into a high-stakes pursuit, driving key decisions and operational risks.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Bobby/Bubba is a vague suspect with limited intelligence.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Bubba is definitively identified as a fugitive and central antagonist, with the operation converging on his capture.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The broader criminal network and potential corruption linked to Bubba remain unexposed.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Moral and Operational Conflict: The Cost of Coercive Tactics
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Garcetti's reliance on intimidation and psychological pressure creates escalating internal and external conflicts, undermining cooperation and exposing ethical and operational flaws.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Garcetti uses physical force to assert dominance over Danny, believing it ensures compliance.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: His tactics breed distrust and resistance, weakening operational integrity and contributing to mission instability.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether more ethical or collaborative methods could have yielded better results remains unexplored.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Shadow of the Past: Garcetti's Hidden Ties to Liz's Murder
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Scattered references suggest Garcetti is indirectly connected to the criminal world surrounding Liz's murder, with implications that his current operation may be entangled with past crimes.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Garcetti's connection to Liz's murder is only hinted at through symbolic references and emotional echoes.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: His death at the hands of an undercover agent may be retribution or closure tied to deeper corruption.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The full extent of Garcetti's involvement in or knowledge of Liz's murder and its aftermath remains unconfirmed.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Investigator to Target: The Erosion of Tanner's Control
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tanner begins as a confident, authoritative investigator directing operations and extracting intelligence, but gradually becomes the object of surveillance and ultimately a victim of violent betrayal. His status shifts from controller to controlled, from agent to target.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Tanner is in full command of the investigation, directing strategic questioning and setting operational priorities.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Tanner is shot, drugged, and left for dead, stripped of agency and physical autonomy.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Tanner survives the attack and how his fall from authority will impact the broader mission remains unknown.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Fracturing of Trust: Tanner and Danny's Relationship
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tanner and Danny's relationship evolves from one of pragmatic trust and emotional support to increasing tension, moral confrontation, and ultimately violent betrayal. What begins as a partnership grounded in mutual need collapses into deception and lethal conflict.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Tanner provides emotional grounding to Danny, reinforcing a bond of trust and operational reliance.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Danny reveals himself as an impostor and shoots Tanner, destroying any semblance of loyalty or alliance.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The true depth of Danny's deception and whether any part of his connection to Tanner was genuine remains ambiguous.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Moral Authority and Its Collapse
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tanner initially positions himself as the moral enforcer within the group, calling out deception and upholding integrity. However, his involvement in rogue operations and handling of illegal weapons undermines his ethical standing, culminating in his downfall at the hands of the very informant he sought to control.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Tanner confronts Danny with moral indignation, asserting himself as the group's ethical compass.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Tanner is complicit in unauthorized, violent operations and is ultimately betrayed, suggesting his moral authority was illusory or unsustainable.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Tanner's actions were justified as necessary law enforcement or represent a descent into corruption remains unresolved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Pursuit of the Breakthrough
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tanner's central goal—achieving a decisive breakthrough in the case—drives his actions across multiple phases. Each intelligence lead renews his hope for resolution, but each is followed by uncertainty, delay, or deception, sustaining the tension of an elusive objective.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Tanner seeks to identify and assess the threat posed by Bobby, initiating a targeted operation.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Tanner believes he has located a key suspect based on an anonymous tip, reigniting hope for a major case resolution.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Despite repeated leads, the case remains unresolved, with the true significance of each tip unconfirmed and the final objective still out of reach.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Hidden War: Mutual Surveillance and Escalation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: A covert conflict emerges between Tanner and Danny, marked by mutual surveillance and escalating acts of manipulation. While Tanner monitors Danny's movements, Danny investigates Tanner's identity and authority, leading to a dangerous game of cat-and-mouse where both believe they are in control.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Danny begins covertly observing Tanner, suspecting his involvement in deeper corruption.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Tanner becomes the target of a suspicious collision, signaling that Danny has moved from observation to active confrontation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Tanner becomes aware of Danny's investigation and how he might retaliate remains uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Search for Identity and Self-Definition
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tom's journey culminates in a persistent struggle to define who he truly is—Tom Van Allen, Danny Flynne, or a fusion of both—ending with the surrender of that definition to the audience and, ultimately, the rejection of fixed identity altogether.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Tom, mortally wounded, pleads for judgment on his true self.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Danny declares Tom's story finished and disengages from both identities, seeking an undefined new self.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The core question of identity—whether shaped by action, memory, or perception—remains open, with no stable resolution achieved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Grief to Vengeance: The Moral Descent
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tom's internal conflict over guilt and grief transforms into a violent crusade for retribution, leading him to embrace brutality as justice, ultimately collapsing under the psychological weight of his actions.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Tom resists forgiveness and insists on hatred as necessary for justice after Liz's death.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Tom completes his vengeance by killing Garcetti and torturing Tanner, but is left shattered and near-suicidal.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Tom's vengeance was justified or self-destructive remains ambiguous, and his ability to survive emotionally is uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Fractured Bond with Liz: Love, Resentment, and Memory
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tom's relationship with Liz evolves from tender intimacy to bitter conflict, haunted by unemployment, judgment, and emotional distance, with her memory later becoming a moral anchor and source of guilt.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Tom and Liz share a loving, spontaneous moment at Salton Sea, deeply connected through music and affection.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Tom confronts Liz's parents and begins to face his guilt, but remains emotionally raw and unreconciled.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The full truth of Liz's death and how Tom's final argument contributed to it remains unprocessed, leaving their relationship unresolved in memory.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Survival Through Deception: The Double Life
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Danny's impersonation of Tom forces a sustained performance of identity, shifting from evasion to strategic navigation, culminating in official recognition of Tom's role—blurring the line between assumed and authentic status.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Danny, as Tom, gets lost and decides to seek directions, initiating active deception under pressure.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Tom's true identity and mission are acknowledged by the FBI, legitimizing his role in the operation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The cost of maintaining the false identity—emotional detachment, moral compromise, and loss of self—remains unhealed even after institutional validation.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Humiliation, Power, and Reclamation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tom endures repeated physical and psychological degradation—from the weasel cage to confrontations with corrupt cops—only to reverse the power dynamic through calculated violence and identity reclamation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Tom is subjected to extreme humiliation in a loyalty test involving a rabid weasel, fighting to survive and maintain cover.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Tom reveals his true name and executes his tormentors, reclaiming agency through brutal vengeance.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: While Tom regains power, the cycle of violence leaves him psychologically broken, questioning whether reclamation was liberation or further entrapment.
